title: Xtra Smoky Brazilian Cheese Lasagna
description: A cheesy, smoky, and citrusy Brazilian dish perfect for a sick day, featuring chopped parsley and a blend of cheeses, with a cheese-pull that will satisfy your cravings.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, smoked mozzarella cheese, chopped parsley, lime juice, salt, and black pepper, mixing well.
Spread a layer of the cheese mixture in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with the cheese mixture, then the noodles, until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
